description: Phase 3 orphan_public_ip contract fixture. Two subscriptions (77.../77 = corp-shared-platform-test, 88.../88 = corp-app-team-sandbox) carry 5 unassociated public-IP review candidates total, while an attached IP and a NAT-associated IP are excluded by the ARG predicate. The lane response uses the real MCP text-content envelope, and one candidate has an unknown SKU (Basic/Dynamic) so impact renders as rate unavailable. Cost-summary playbook output is otherwise minimal.
